summary: Growth Engine Pack Testing Complete. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 4 pages load correctly with proper content.

tests: Page loads with title 'Unified Commission Engine'
Goal: 'Generate commission only after payment approval'
Goal: 'Track affiliate and sales commission in one ledger'
Goal: 'Prevent over-allocation beyond the distribution layer'
Scope Type dropdown (product_group, product, service_group, service)
Recommendation text: 'up to ~5% where distribution layer supports it'
Rule: 'Minimum payout threshold: 50,000 TZS or higher'
Rule: 'Only approved commissions are eligible for payout'
Rule: 'Admin approval before funds are released'
Page loads with title 'Sales Commission Dashboard'
Metrics displayed: Assigned Opportunities (34), Closed Deals (11)
Referral Tools card with link and promo code (SALE123)
Commission explanation: 'Sales commission is generated only from the protected extra distributable layer'
POST calculates safe promotion budget correctly
Uses default markup values (20% markup, 10% extra)
Returns payout eligibility for affiliate beneficiary type
Returns payout eligibility for sales beneficiary type
Creates sales commission for self-generated lead (full commission)
Creates sales commission for affiliate lead (reduced commission)
Captures affiliate attribution with affiliate_code and affiliate_user_id
Captures hybrid attribution (both affiliate and sales)
Max safe promotion never exceeds distributable layer
Promotions only come from distributable layer, not protected markup

critical_code_review_comments: Note: Attribution engine endpoint is /capture not /track - documentation should be updated if needed
Frontend pages use static/hardcoded data for display metrics - consider connecting to backend APIs for real-time data
seed_data_creation: Created test commission records and campaigns with TEST_ prefix

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are functional and return real data. Frontend pages use static data for display.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Growth Engine Pack fully tested. All 4 pages load correctly: /admin/commission-engine (control goals), /admin/promotion-engine (campaign form), /admin/payout-engine (recommended rules), /staff/commission-dashboard (metrics + referral tools). All APIs working: promotion-engine/preview calculates safe budget from distributable layer only, payout-engine/summary returns eligibility with 50K TZS minimum, commission-engine-unified/create creates records, attribution-engine/capture tracks source_type. Key business rule verified: 20% company markup protected, only extra distributable layer is shared.
